screenShaderDisplayRenderReviewFollowUp.policyDecision: Keep current writable behavior temporarily, but require a later dedicated migration sprint to move decoration.screen_shader behind a display/render high-risk gate or otherwise resolve the mismatch.
screenShaderDisplayRenderReviewFollowUp.riskFinding: Non-empty values are config-relative shader files that Hyprland reads and compiles as the final screen fragment shader; path validation alone is not display/render safety proof.
screenShaderDisplayRenderReviewFollowUp.metadataUpdate: Write review projection now shows a display/render-sensitive warning for decoration.screen_shader.
screenShaderDisplayRenderReviewFollowUp.previousRecommendedNextSprint: Screen shader production gate enforcement decision sprint; decide whether to migrate production writes into the proven watchdog gate, keep temporary writable candidate status, or propose block/removal with explicit user approval.
screenShaderDisplayRenderReviewFollowUp.recommendedNextSprint: Screen shader optional advisory UI exposure design sprint; design how to expose the non-production advisory helper as an explicit advanced user action without wiring advisory output into validators, pending changes, write planning, apply flow, or write safety decisions.
